zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Hampton於1342年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾格亞特 吉波爾時，她的父親Sir Richard de Hampden33歲，母親Avice Upton32歲。她於1372年與Sir Richard Baskerville在英國英格蘭賀福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1375年在英國英格蘭賀福爾易亞迪斯利享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Hampton于1342年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾格亞特 吉波爾时，她的父亲Sir Richard de Hampden33岁，母亲Avice Upton32岁。她于1372年与Sir Richard Baskerville在英国英格兰賀福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1375年在英国英格兰賀福爾易亞迪斯利享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hampton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Hampton, including the cities of Southampton and Northampton (both of which were originally simply Hamtun). These all share the final Old English element tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’, but the first is variously hām ‘homestead’, hamm ‘water meadow’, or hēan, weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of hēah ‘high’. This surname is also found in Ireland, having first been taken there in the medieval period.

History: The descendants of the clergyman Thomas Hampton, resident at Jamestown, VA, in 1630, lived in VA through three generations, multiplying their homesteads as the colony expanded and then branched into SC. This very common English name was brought independently to North America by many other bearers.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Hampton was born in 1342, in Great Kimble, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Richard de Hampden, was 33 and her mother, Avice Upton, was 32. She married Sir Richard Baskerville in 1372, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1375, in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Hampton est née en 1342, à Great Kimble, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard de Hampden, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Avice Upton, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Baskerville en 1372, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1375, à Eardisley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Hampton 1342 in Great Kimble, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard de Hampden 33 und ihre Mutter Avice Upton 32. Sie hat 1372 in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Richard Baskerville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1375 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Hampton è nata il nel 1342 nel Great Kimble, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard de Hampden, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Avice Upton, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Baskerville nel 1372, nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1375, nel Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Hamptonが1342年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト キンブルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard de Hampdenは33歳，母Avice Uptonは32歳であった。1372年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでSir Richard Baskervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1375年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアルディスリーで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Hampton(이)가 1342년 영국 벅잉함실르 그리트 킴블일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard de Hampden(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Avice Upton(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1372년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 Sir Richard Baskerville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 에르디슬리에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Hampton nasceu em 1342, em Great Kimble, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard de Hampden, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Avice Upton, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Baskerville em 1372, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1375, em Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Hampton родилась в 1342 г. в местности грит кимбл, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard de Hampden было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Avice Upton, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Baskerville в 1372 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1375 г. в местности эардисли, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Hampton nació en 1342, en Great Kimble, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard de Hampden, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Avice Upton, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Baskerville en 1372, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1375, en Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años.
